race.comment: LUCKY LANDING (3) boasts a good record over this track and trip and looks ready to fire third-up after a strong performance last time out. A good draw should see him close to the speed and he's a third-up winner in the past. Can land the knockout blow this time. STREET MASCHINO (11) missed the placings two starts back then ran a better race when he worked home well and finished 1.3 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1615m at this track. Looks well placed so expect a big run this time. FORTUNE'S LUCK (7) went back to leading in her past couple of efforts, bolting in last start by 1.9L. An inside draw can see her up front again from the outset and she can repeat the dose. WOLFMAN (10) finished third last start over 1780m at this track, beaten 2.5 lengths. Should be peaking. Placed to advantage and can fill another top-three spot. LEAVING LAS VEGAS (6) is next best.
